title: SvelteKit Climbs Rankings, Vite Surges Ahead

topics.title: Internationalization Updates
topics.summary: A fix has been implemented to localize the display of size increase/decrease percentages. The update utilizes the Intl.NumberFormat API to ensure correct formatting across different languages, addressing a common issue with hard-coded percentage values in the UI.

topics.title: UI Improvements
topics.summary: Recent minor UI enhancements have been merged, focusing on mobile device usability. Key updates include centering the noodle, resizing the 'jump to' button, and ensuring the timeline chart sticky note remains visible on narrow screens. These changes aim to improve overall user experience.

topics.title: SvelteKit Ranking Update
topics.summary: SvelteKit has made significant progress in the rankings, moving from #10 to #6, with the possibility of reaching #4 soon. Meanwhile, Vite has overtaken Nuxt for the #2 position, while Svelte maintains a strong lead, indicating a competitive landscape in the framework ecosystem.
